'''鈭歯-v-zh''' ('''kanavazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preassociate|preassociate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preassociate|preassociate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kanavazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavazh|thinavazh]] || [[word:jinavazh|jinavazh]] || [[word:shinavazh|shinavazh]] || [[word:kinavazh|kinavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunavazh|thuthunavazh]] || [[word:jujunavazh|jujunavazh]] || [[word:shushunavazh|shushunavazh]] || [[word:kukunavazh|kukunavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunavazh|thunavazh]] || [[word:junavazh|junavazh]] || [[word:shunavazh|shunavazh]] || [[word:kunavazh|kunavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunavazh|thunavazh]] || [[word:junavazh|junavazh]] || [[word:shunavazh|shunavazh]] || [[word:kunavazh|kunavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenavazh|thenavazh]] || [[word:jenavazh|jenavazh]] || [[word:shenavazh|shenavazh]] || [[word:kenavazh|kenavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonavazh|thothonavazh]] || [[word:jojonavazh|jojonavazh]] || [[word:shoshonavazh|shoshonavazh]] || [[word:kokonavazh|kokonavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonavazh|thonavazh]] || [[word:jonavazh|jonavazh]] || [[word:shonavazh|shonavazh]] || [[word:konavazh|konavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonavazh|thonavazh]] || [[word:jonavazh|jonavazh]] || [[word:shonavazh|shonavazh]] || [[word:konavazh|konavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙navazh|th忙navazh]] || [[word:j忙navazh|j忙navazh]] || [[word:sh忙navazh|sh忙navazh]] || [[word:k忙navazh|k忙navazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanavazh|thathanavazh]] || [[word:jajanavazh|jajanavazh]] || [[word:shashanavazh|shashanavazh]] || [[word:kakanavazh|kakanavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanavazh|thanavazh]] || [[word:janavazh|janavazh]] || [[word:shanavazh|shanavazh]] || [[word:kanavazh|kanavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanavazh|thanavazh]] || [[word:janavazh|janavazh]] || [[word:shanavazh|shanavazh]] || [[word:kanavazh|kanavazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanavazh|shanavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanavazh|goshanavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanavazh|gokishanavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanavazhn眉|shanavazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkn眉|goshanavazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanavazhn眉|gokishanavazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanavazhsh毛|shanavazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanavazhnksh毛|goshanavazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanavazhsh毛|gokishanavazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanavazhro|shanavazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkro|goshanavazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanavazhro|gokishanavazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanavazhmu|shanavazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkmu|goshanavazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanavazhmu|gokishanavazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanavazhsher|shanavazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanavazhnksher|goshanavazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanavazhsher|gokishanavazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanavazhng|shanavazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkng|goshanavazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanavazhng|gokishanavazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanavazhya|shanavazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkya|goshanavazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanavazhya|gokishanavazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanavazhyam|shanavazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkyam|goshanavazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanavazhyam|gokishanavazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanavazhn眉sh毛|shanavazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkn眉sh毛|goshanavazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanavazhn眉sh毛|gokishanavazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanavazhn眉ro|shanavazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkn眉ro|goshanavazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanavazhn眉ro|gokishanavazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanavazhn眉mu|shanavazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkn眉mu|goshanavazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanavazhn眉mu|gokishanavazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanavazhsh毛n眉|shanavazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanavazhnksh毛n眉|goshanavazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanavazhsh毛n眉|gokishanavazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanavazhsh毛ro|shanavazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanavazhnksh毛ro|goshanavazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanavazhsh毛ro|gokishanavazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanavazhsh毛mu|shanavazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanavazhnksh毛mu|goshanavazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanavazhsh毛mu|gokishanavazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanavazhron眉|shanavazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkron眉|goshanavazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanavazhron眉|gokishanavazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanavazhrosh毛|shanavazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkrosh毛|goshanavazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanavazhrosh毛|gokishanavazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanavazhromu|shanavazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkromu|goshanavazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanavazhromu|gokishanavazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanavazhmun眉|shanavazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkmun眉|goshanavazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanavazhmun眉|gokishanavazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanavazhmush毛|shanavazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkmush毛|goshanavazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanavazhmush毛|gokishanavazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanavazhmuro|shanavazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanavazhnkmuro|goshanavazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanavazhmuro|gokishanavazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5445898}}
